title: Appendices & Extended Data: From ergonomics to algorithms: systems-based interventions to improve safety, quality, and wellbeing in orthopaedic and trauma surgery – protocol for a systematic review.
author: Delle Monache, Carlo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This is the Appendices and Extended Data document (including a completed PRISMA-P 2015 checklist, SPiDER Eligibility criteria, Search strategy, Data extraction table, and QuaDS appraisal tool) for a protocol paper titled: "From ergonomics to algorithms: systems-based interventions to improve safety, quality, and wellbeing in orthopaedic and trauma surgery – protocol for a systematic review."
steps_raw: This is the Appendices and Extended Data document (including a completed PRISMA-P 2015 checklist, SPiDER Eligibility criteria, Search strategy, Data extraction table, and QuaDS appraisal tool) for a protocol paper titled: "From ergonomics to algorithms: systems-based interventions to improve safety, quality, and wellbeing in orthopaedic and trauma surgery – protocol for a systematic review."
